claims.text: Meta logs an Instant Form lead the moment it's submitted, but many businesses only see it when someone manually checks Ads Manager or exports a CSV
Response-time research shows contact and close rates drop fast once a lead sits untouched past the first hour
Meta lets you connect an Instant Form directly to a CRM through the Integrations tab so leads route in real time instead of manual export
Black Arrow's platform routes every lead into one inbox and can text back automatically within seconds
